item.title: Boost Your Resume's ATS Score! 📈 • Research job descriptions for relevant keywords. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% using X strategy.” • Customize your resume for each job application. • Avoid fancy fonts and graphics—stick to plain text. • Use bullet points for clear, concise achievements. How can you ensure your resume passes the ATS and reaches a human recruiter? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Boost Your Resume's ATS Score! 📈 • Research job descriptions for relevant keywords. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% using X strategy.” • Customize your resume for each job application. • Avoid fancy fonts and graphics—stick to plain text. • Use bullet points for clear, concise achievements. How can you ensure your resume passes the ATS and reaches a human recruiter? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
